def receiver(
    signal: list[Signal] | tuple[Signal, ...] | Signal,
    *,
    sender: object | None = ...,
    weak: bool = ...,
    dispatch_uid: _AnyHashable | None = ...,
    **named: Any,
) -> Callable[[_F], _F]: ...

class PathInfo(NamedTuple):
    from_opts: Options
    to_opts: Options
    target_fields: tuple[Field, ...]
    join_field: Field
    m2m: bool
    direct: bool
    filtered_relation: FilteredRelation | None

class JoinInfo(NamedTuple):
    final_field: Field
    targets: tuple[Any, ...]
    opts: Any
    joins: list[str]
    path: list[Any]
    transform_function: Callable[[Field, str], Expression]

CSRF_SECRET_LENGTH = 32
CSRF_TOKEN_LENGTH = 2 * CSRF_SECRET_LENGTH
CSRF_ALLOWED_CHARS = string.ascii_letters + string.digits
CSRF_SESSION_KEY = "_csrftoken"

SILENCED_SYSTEM_CHECKS = [
    "security.W008",  # SSL redirect is handled by nginx
    "security.W009",  # SECRET_KEY is setup through Ansible secrets
]

AUTHENTICATION_BACKENDS = (
    "ratelimitbackend.backends.RateLimitModelBackend",
    "allauth.account.auth_backends.AuthenticationBackend",
)
